decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (project_14th-street-transit-truck-priority-pilot) already maps to an existing registry record with the exact same record_id. The source_id 14th_street_truck_transit_priority_trifold_r1_p2 is already listed in that record's source_ids, and the alias project_14th-street-transit-truck-priority-trifold is already present in its record_aliases. The observation is already correctly identified and requires no linking.
